title: Thai Chicken Fritters
description: A fusion of Italian and Thai flavors, these crispy fritters are a delicious twist on traditional Italian cuisine.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine mung bean flour, rice flour, all-purpose flour, crispy fried onions, and grated Parmesan cheese.
Add eggs and Thai fish sauce to the bowl and mix well.
Add chicken breast to the bowl and mix until the chicken is coated with the batter.
Heat about 1-2 inches of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Once the oil is hot, add the chicken fritters to the skillet and fry until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the Thai chicken fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
